description: Migration up/down on plain PG: table, unique (tenant,slug), no RLS (post-20260509 architecture)
Existing tenants seeded with exactly six built-ins; onboarding path seeds a fresh tenant
fields_schema validation: bad kind/key/duplicate keys/select-without-options rejected
Slug: generated from name, reserved slugs rejected, per-tenant uniqueness conflict typed
Delete blocked while an asset uses the slug; allowed after re-type
Built-in rows: schema immutable, name/icon editable
Registry actions: 403 without asset.update (writes) / asset.read (reads); envelopes typed
Settings page lists registry with built-ins flagged; create persists; in-use delete shows guard message
Schema editor: add/remove/reorder/kind/required/options round-trip into fields_schema
Type select offers built-ins + custom from registry
Custom type form renders schema fields, enforces required, writes attributes[key]
Built-in type create/edit unchanged (extension panels regression)
createAsset rejects unknown custom slug; accepts registered one with attributes payload
List/filter shows custom type labels; filtering by custom type narrows correctly
Detail renders schema read panel for custom-type asset
Dashboard by-type counts include custom types with labels
Report/export resolves custom labels
Layout map select includes custom types; resolver returns their slugs
Create-from-layout: generated schema mirrors layout fields; assignment stored; idempotent slug collision handled
Import onto generated type fills schema-keyed attributes + hudu_fields both
i18n: keys resolve in en; 7 locales carry them; no hardcoded strings in new components
Existing asset suites green; hudu suites green; permissions sweep extended
Citus chain applies the migration (distributed, colocated, no RLS)
